$ bunx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts misc-routes.agent-event
▲ [WARNING] The condition "types" here will never be used as it comes after "default" [package.json]

    package.json:164:6:
      164 │       "types": "./src/services/app-session-gate.d.ts"
          ╵       ~~~~~~~

  The "default" condition comes earlier and will always be chosen:

    package.json:163:6:
      163 │       "default": "./dist/services/app-session-gate.js",
          ╵       ~~~~~~~~~
